title: Robust TTS Engine Fallback Strategy
essence: Multi-engine TTS fallback with proper error handling and user feedback
steps: Try Gemini Preview TTS first with comprehensive error handling
Fall back to OpenAI TTS with different voice mapping
Implement final fallback to cached/synthetic responses
Provide user feedback for TTS failures
tradeoffs: Increased latency due to fallback attempts
Higher API costs with multiple provider usage
Complex error handling logic to maintain
rollback: Remove fallback logic and use single provider
Simplify to basic try/catch without user feedback
Disable TTS on failure instead of falling back

signals: Successful audio playback even when primary engine fails
evidence.notes: Proven in production - maintains user experience during provider issues
